description_long: This airplane features a streamlined, aerodynamic fuselage with a pointed nose and a smooth, rounded canopy area. Its wings are sharply swept back and mounted high on the body, with pronounced winglets at the tips for enhanced stability. The tail section is distinctive, with a large vertical stabilizer and multiple horizontal stabilizers, giving it a unique, almost fin-like appearance. The undercarriage is not visibly extended, suggesting retractable landing gear or a design without exposed wheels. The color scheme is primarily a soft blue with white and gray accents, creating a modern and sleek visual impression. The overall design suggests a high-speed, possibly futuristic or stylized aircraft, with no visible external engines or propellers.
description: A sleek, blue and white airplane with swept-back high wings, pronounced winglets, and a distinctive multi-fin tail. The design is streamlined and modern, with a pointed nose and smooth canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, high-mounted swept wings with winglets, and the symmetrical, streamlined body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, smooth canopy, and the unique multi-fin tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the wide wingspan, pronounced winglets, and the complex tail fin arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile and the distinctive tail and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and prominent upward-angled winglets; no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines or propellers; engine type not apparent from images.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with a large central vertical stabilizer and multiple horizontal stabilizers extending from the tail section.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; configuration not apparent from images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated smoothly into the fuselage with a single canopy.
